claims.headline: Supports memory
claims.notesSentence: A 180-day multicenter RCT in mild-to-moderate Alzheimer's reported cognitive improvement vs. placebo.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Alpha-GPC Alzheimer's multicenter RCT on PubMed

claims.headline: Boosts physical power
claims.notesSentence: A 6-day RCT in healthy adults reported improvements in lower-body isometric force after Alpha-GPC supplementation.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Alpha-GPC isometric strength RCT on PubMed
